data.name: Description
data.value: Generate deployment artifacts for an AppHost

data.name: SelectAPublisher
data.value: Select a publisher:

data.name: ProjectArgumentDescription
data.value: The path to the Aspire AppHost project file or a directory to search

data.name: OutputPathArgumentDescription
data.value: The output path for the generated artifacts. Defaults to the AppHost directory's 'aspire-output' folder if not specified.

data.name: GeneratingArtifacts
data.value: Generating artifacts...

data.name: OperationCompletedPrefix
data.value: PUBLISHING COMPLETED

data.name: OperationFailedPrefix
data.value: PUBLISHING FAILED

data.name: InputPromptLoading
data.value: Loading...

data.name: NoBuildArgumentDescription
data.value: Do not build or restore the project before running

data.name: VerificationFailed
data.value: Published output verification failed.

data.name: VerificationSucceeded
data.value: Published output is up to date.

data.name: VerifyAppHostDirectoryChanged
data.value: The AppHost output plan reported a different AppHost directory.

data.name: VerifyAppHostDirectoryUnavailable
data.value: The AppHost project directory could not be resolved.

data.name: VerifyDestinationLinkEscape
data.value: A publish destination escapes the Git repository through a symbolic link or junction.

data.name: VerifyDestinationOutsideRepository
data.value: All publish destinations must be inside the AppHost Git repository.

data.name: VerifyDuplicateOutputs
data.value: The AppHost output plan contains duplicate output identities.

data.name: VerifyFinalStateUnavailable
data.value: The final AppHost output state was not available for reconciliation.

data.name: VerifyGitQueryFailed
data.value: Git could not evaluate the files included in the publish destinations.

data.name: VerifyGitUnavailable
data.value: Publish verification requires the AppHost to be inside an available Git repository.

data.name: VerifyHostingIncompatible
data.value: The AppHost does not support publish verification. Update the AppHost to a newer version of Aspire.

data.name: VerifyInvalidDestinationPath
data.value: A publish destination path could not be resolved safely.

data.name: VerifyLinkedOutputPath
data.value: Publish verification does not support symbolic links or junctions inside output trees.

data.name: VerifyListStepsNotSupported
data.value: The --verify and --list-steps options cannot be used together.

data.name: VerifyManifestFileNotSupported
data.value: Publish verification does not support a direct manifest file output. Publish the manifest to a directory so all companion artifacts can be inventoried.

data.name: VerifyMissingFilesHeader
data.value: Missing files in '{0}':

data.name: VerifyNestedRepository
data.value: Publish destinations cannot contain or be inside nested Git repositories or submodules.

data.name: VerifyOptionDescription
data.value: Verify generated artifacts match the Git-included output without modifying it

data.name: VerifyOrphanedFilesHeader
data.value: Orphaned files in '{0}':

data.name: VerifyOutputPlanChanged
data.value: The AppHost output plan changed after execution was authorized.

data.name: VerifyOutputKindMismatch
data.value: A publish output path does not match its declared file or directory kind.

data.name: VerifyOutputChangedDuringShutdown
data.value: Published output changed after the AppHost reported completion.

data.name: VerifyOverlappingOutputs
data.value: The AppHost output plan contains overlapping destinations or staging paths.

data.name: VerifyPrimaryOutputMismatch
data.value: The AppHost output plan does not contain the expected staged primary output.

data.name: VerifyRegenerateCommand
data.value: Regenerate with: {0}

data.name: VerifyStagingCleanupFailed
data.value: The temporary publish verification directory could not be removed.

data.name: VerifyStaleFilesHeader
data.value: Stale files in '{0}':

data.name: VerifyUnexpectedOutputState
data.value: The AppHost reported an unexpected output-plan state: {0}.

data.name: VerifyUnknownOutputKind
data.value: The AppHost reported an unsupported output kind: {0}.

data.name: VerifyUnsupportedSteps
data.value: These selected pipeline steps do not support output relocation: {0}.

data.name: VerifyWritablePathOutsideStaging
data.value: The AppHost output plan contains a writable path outside the verification staging directory.
